description: Child table of Partner Transcript Import Batch. One row per student-course grade being imported.

fields.description: Required unless a Student Email is provided. Resolved from Student Email during Dry-Run when left blank.
fields.label: Student

fields.description: Autocompletes from submitted Partner Seminary Course Equivalences for the selected partner. Selecting a value auto-fills Source Course Name and Source Credit Value.
fields.label: Source Course Code

fields.description: Autocompletes from the partner's default grading scale grade codes.
fields.label: Source Grade

fields.description: Source-system ID if available; takes precedence over the natural key for idempotency.
fields.label: External Reference

fields.description: Fields populated by the dry-run pass. Editable only via registrar override workflow.
fields.label: Resolved (Dry-Run Output)

fields.description: Target-scale threshold (serving grade-point role) corresponding to the resolved grade code at entry time.
fields.label: Resolved Grade Threshold

fields.description: Registrar-provided reason for accepting a row that the dry-run flagged. Unblocks commit when a warning is raised.
fields.label: Override Note

fields.description: Back-pointer to the Program Enrollment that received this row post-commit.
fields.label: Committed Program Enrollment

fields.description: CSV-friendly alternative to the Student link. Resolved to a Student record via Student.user during Dry-Run. Required unless a Student is set directly.
fields.label: Student email

name: Partner Transcript Import Row
